spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (fetch(, navigator., document.querySelector) with runtime script (~16131 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 16 buttons, 0 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (access, agent, behalf, credentials, delegated, delegation, executes, fedcm, grants, inspector, obtains, revokes, step, t).

edge_cases.rationale: Page references 20 edge case / failure / fallback hits and the control surface has room to exercise distinct branches, so the happy path is not the only one shown.

references.rationale: References section cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link directly.

design_system.rationale: 1 button rule(s) override `background` without also overriding `color`. The global button rule sets both, so this leaves the text colour inherited from the dark default (CLAUDE.md rule #6).

openQuestions.title: Pair every button background override with a colour override
openQuestions.detail: Audit the inline `<style>` block: each `button { background: ... }` (or `.foo-btn { background: ... }`) needs an explicit `color: ...` next to it. CLAUDE.md rule #6 documents the light-on-light invisibility bug this causes.

summary: Concept ships ~16131 chars of script across 16 button(s) and 0 other control(s). hits 5 pass / 1 partial across the six rubric criteria with no outright fails.
